treatment_timeline.event: Patient admitted with abdominal pain, underwent surgery for acute cholecystitis

patient_outcome.follow_up_details: Follow up in the Acute Care Surgery clinic at the appointment listed
patient_outcome.quality_of_life: Patient may feel weak or 'washed out' for a couple of weeks but these feelings are expected to go away in a short time
patient_outcome.patient_perspective: All feelings and reactions described as normal and should resolve shortly. If they do not, patient was advised to tell the surgeon.
